aiChat.title: 🤖 AI Consultation
aiChat.greeting:
Hello! 😊
Ask me anything about your medication.
I can help with dosage, side effects, precautions, and more.
aiChat.q3: Can I take it before meals?
aiChat.q4: Can I take it with other drugs?
aiChat.a1:
Most medications can have side effects. Common ones include stomach upset, headaches, and dizziness.

If severe symptoms occur, stop taking the medication immediately and consult your doctor.
aiChat.a2:
Some pain relievers and cold medicines may contain caffeine.

Check the ingredient list on the packaging or ask your pharmacist.
aiChat.a3:
Timing varies by medication.

• Before meals: Better absorbed on an empty stomach
• After meals: To reduce stomach irritation

Follow the instructions on your prescription or medicine bag.
aiChat.a4:
Drug interactions can occur.

If you're taking other medications, be sure to inform your doctor or pharmacist. Special caution is needed with blood pressure, diabetes, and blood-thinning medications.
aiChat.defaultAnswer:
I'm looking up information about this medication.

Please consult your doctor or pharmacist for accurate dosage information. Generally, this medication is best taken after meals. If side effects occur, stop taking it and consult a professional.

sampleMeds.tylenolEffect: Antipyretic, analgesic (headache, toothache, muscle pain, back pain, menstrual pain, joint pain)
sampleMeds.tylenolDosage: 1-2 tablets per dose, 3-4 times daily (at least 4 hours apart)
sampleMeds.tylenolWarning:
Caution for liver disease patients. Do not take with alcohol.
Do not exceed 4g per day.
sampleMeds.tylenolSideEffect: Rarely: rash, hives, liver function abnormalities
sampleMeds.tylenolExplanation:
This medicine is for when you have a headache or fever.
You can take it up to 3 times a day, at least 4 hours apart.
sampleMeds.tylenolDosageSimple: 1-2 tablets per dose, up to 3 times daily
sampleMeds.tylenolWarnSimple:
Be careful if you have liver problems.
Do not take with alcohol.
sampleMeds.tylenolExplanationSimple:
This medicine is for headaches or fever.
Take at least 4 hours apart.
sampleMeds.tylenolWarnTts: Caution for liver disease, do not take with alcohol
